creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
Had the dreamiest lunch escape just one hour from London ✨ @beaverbrook balloons 🎈 

Beaverbrook’s iconic hot air balloon dining experience  is back and it’s truly something special. This year it’s been beautifully reimagined in collaboration with luxury lifestyle brand Summerill & Bishop 🌸 @summerillandbishop 

From the romantic floral designs to the stunning setting, every detail felt like stepping into a dream. Paired with beautiful, thoughtfully curated dishes, top-notch service, and the signature open-flame Yakiniku experience 🔥🍽️

The perfect luxury countryside escape for a date, celebration, or simply something different 💫

📍 Beaverbrook, Surrey

Would you try this unique dining experience? 👀 with @kseniia.journey 

#Beaverbrook #SummerillAndBishop #LuxuryDiningUK #LondonDayTrips #HotAirBalloonDining SurreyLife FoodieUK
